learnings.title: Letter sounds
learnings.focus: Hear the sound and name of each letter.
lookFor: Spots the letter that makes a sound
Knows a, e, i, o, u are vowels and every word needs one

playgrounds.note: Hear each letter's sound and name as you trace it
Sound out the letters in each word as you trace it
Blend the letter sounds as you build the word
Listen for the sound at the start of each word

learnings.title: Trace letters
learnings.focus: Trace letter shapes and learn how each letter is formed.
lookFor: Follows the letter stroke with a finger
Forms round letters with an anti-clockwise curve
Knows capital letters start names and sentences

playgrounds.note: Trace each letter shape from start to finish

learnings.title: Trace whole words
learnings.focus: Trace whole words and recognise them.
lookFor: Traces curved, round letters like c, o and g
Points to the start of the word

playgrounds.note: Trace each word from start to finish and say it out loud

learnings.title: Build words
learnings.focus: Build words letter by letter, from left to right.
lookFor: Builds a word without seeing the picture

playgrounds.note: Place the letters in order, left to right, to build the word

learnings.title: Rhyming words
learnings.focus: Listen for words that rhyme and sound alike.
lookFor: Hears the end sound in a word

playgrounds.note: Listen for words that rhyme and say one back
